title: Yorkville University - Canada.ca
content:
## Yorkville University
You are eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and you meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Bachelor of Business Administration with specializations in Accounting, Energy Management, Project Management or Supply Chain Management
- Bachelor of Business Administration (General)
- Associate of Arts Degree
You are not eligible if you complete any other program at this school.
